title: epidendrum subliberum
intro: Epidendrum subliberum is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, known for its unique, small, and delicate white flowers with a distinctive fragrance. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Epidendrum subliberum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds.
